meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with unfixable bugs. Learn how to implement advanced user onboarding to audit code execution and resolve bottlenecks using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Debugging failures often stem from missing execution context. By implementing an automated user onboarding flow that captures state snapshots and environment variables upon user interaction, you effectively 'debug by proxy.' Use Antigravity to instrument your telemetry and Claude Code to analyze these logs, turning opaque errors into actionable, fixable code paths.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal that refuses to cooperate. The stack trace is a labyrinth, the client is pinging you for updates, and your confidence is eroding with every failed refactor. We’ve all been there—the 'unfixable' bug that turns a profitable project into a time-sink hole.

The secret isn't better intuition; it's better instrumentation. By shifting your perspective from manual debugging to designing an onboarding flow that surfaces runtime reality, you transform a blind hunt for bugs into a surgical strike. Let’s stop guessing and start engineering with precision.

steps.title: Instrument State Capture
steps.description: Inject telemetry into your onboarding flow to capture the application state right before the user triggers a failure point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current onboarding flow. Identify the critical user interaction points where state should be persisted to local storage or a debug log for post-mortem analysis.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'instrument onboarding with state logging'

steps.title: Validate Environment Context
steps.description: Ensure the user's environment is compatible before onboarding proceeds, preventing 'works on my machine' errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a pre-flight check script that verifies system dependencies and browser environment compatibility, returning a structured JSON report if any check fails.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'pre-flight-check.ts' and integrate into onboarding

steps.title: Automate Error Reporting
steps.description: Hook your onboarding steps into an error-tracking service so every failure event includes the full user journey metadata.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate an error boundary wrapper around the onboarding component that captures the last 5 user interactions as a payload for bug reports.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'onboarding-boundary.tsx' to include interaction history

steps.title: Simulate User Paths
steps.description: Use synthetic users in your onboarding flow to identify where logic breaks before a real user ever encounters it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of synthetic user paths that exercise every branch of the onboarding logic, focusing on edge cases like network latency and invalid inputs.

steps.title: Claude Code Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the gathered telemetry into Claude Code to identify the exact line of code causing the bottleneck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the logs from the onboarding failure and provide a diff to fix the underlying state management issue.

pro_tips: Always log the user's browser version and viewport size in your debug snapshots; UI bugs are often hardware-specific.
Use feature flags to toggle debugging mode for specific user segments without redeploying your entire stack.
Never ship onboarding without a 'reset state' button; it saves more development time than any debugger.
Normalize your log format across the entire onboarding flow to make Claude Code analysis 10x faster.
If a bug persists, use Claude Code to write a unit test that fails specifically for that bug; it forces you to isolate the logic.
content.next_steps: Once you have implemented these onboarding checks, schedule a review of your error logs every 48 hours. Focus on the 'top 3' recurring errors to reduce your support overhead by 80% over the next month.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start building with the confidence of a senior architect. We have the blueprints, the tools, and the community to help you ship faster than ever. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
